mapper.sql: SELECT material_id, material_code, material_name, material_type, spec_model, unit, shelf_life_days, expiry_alert_days, is_expiry_manage, safety_stock_min, safety_stock_max, is_batch_manage, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM wms_material
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_material (material_code, material_name, material_type, spec_model, unit, shelf_life_days, expiry_alert_days, is_expiry_manage, safety_stock_min, safety_stock_max, is_batch_manage, status, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{materialType}, #{specModel}, #{unit}, #{shelfLifeDays}, #{expiryAlertDays}, #{isExpiryManage}, #{safetyStockMin}, #{safetyStockMax}, #{isBatchManage}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE wms_material SET del_flag = '2' WHERE material_id IN #{materialId}
